---
title: "Members"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
listing: 
  - id: pi
    contents:
      - "members/jake.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: false
    image-align: "left"
  - id: postdocs
    contents:
      - "members/xiaoyu.qmd"
      - "members/lijun.qmd"
      - "members/lea.qmd"
      - "members/hannah.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: false
    image-align: "left"
  - id: phds
    contents:
      - "members/jon.qmd"
      - "members/gabri.qmd"
      - "members/narjes.qmd"
      - "members/mirjam.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: false
    image-align: "left"
  - id: ras
    contents:
      - "members/ruoyi.qmd"
      - "members/gabriele.qmd"
      - "members/romina.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: false
    image-align: "left"
---

<div class="members-page">

![](images/GroupPhotoV1.jpg)

------------------------------------------

## Principal Investigator

:::{#pi}

:::

## Postdocs

:::{#postdocs}

:::

## Graduate Students

:::{#phds}

:::

## Research Assistants

:::{#ras}

:::

------------------------------------------

## Bachelor / Master Students

<div class="student-gallery">

<div class="student-tile">
![](members/images/nadine.jpeg)
**Nadine Li Pigida**  
Project (Master)
Bioinformatics
</div>

<div class="student-tile">
![](members/images/ruizhen.jpg)
**Ruizhen Shen**  
Master Thesis 
Machine Learning, Systems and Control
</div>

<div class="student-tile">
![](members/images/yaqi.jpg)
**Yaqi Jiao**  
Project (Master)  
Bioinformatics
</div>

<div class="student-tile">
![](members/images/elsa.jpg)
**Elsa Gustafsson**  
Internship (Master)
Biomedical Engineering
</div>

<div class="student-tile">
![](members/images/catarina.jpg)
**Catarina Barreiros**  
Bachelor Thesis  
Biomedicine
</div>

<div class="student-tile">
![](members/images/emma.jpg)
**Emma Volcov**  
Bachelor Thesis  
Biomedicine
</div>

</div>

</div>
